legislative_history_by_session.statement: AB30 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing water. (BDR 48-214)
AB51 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing the management of water. (BDR 48-213)
AB62 in 80th2019: Revises provisions related to water. (BDR 48-215)
AB95 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to water. (BDR 48-504)
AB163 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing water conservation. (BDR 48-798)
AB233 in 80th2019: Revises provisions related to water. (BDR 48-45)
AB265 in 80th2019: Requires the Desert Research Institute to conduct a study concerning water treatment and recycling. (BDR S-901)
SB47 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to state lands. (BDR 26-216)
SB140 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to the use of groundwater in certain basins. (BDR 48-541)
SB150 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to land use planning. (BDR 22-775)

SB499 in 80th2019: Creates the Advisory Board on Water Resources Planning and Drought Resiliency. (BDR 48-1243)
SB507 in 80th2019: Makes an appropriation to the State Public Works Division of the Department of Administration for the support of the Marlette Lake Water System. (BDR S-1176)
SB509 in 80th2019: Makes appropriations to the Division of Water Resources for the replacement of vehicles and computer software and hardware. (BDR S-1181)
SB76 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing the provision of services by the Colorado River Commission of Nevada. (BDR 58-207)
SB547 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to providers of new electric resources. (BDR 58-913)
AB52 in 80th2019: Creates the Division of Natural Heritage within the State Department of Conservation and Natural Resources. (BDR 18-217)

AB58 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing violations of regulations adopted by the Administrator of the Division of State Parks of the State Department of Conservation and Natural Resources. (BDR 35-212)
AB93 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to the Account for License Plates for the Support of the Preservation and Restoration of the Natural Environment of the Lake Tahoe Basin. (BDR 26-437)
AB96 in 80th2019: Requires the creation of the Historic Sites Passport Program as a pilot program. (BDR 33-505)
AB171 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to the admission to state parks and recreational areas in this State by certain veterans. (BDR 35-4)
AB229 in 80th2019: Requires the establishment of a technical advisory program for the protection and preservation of certain buildings and structures. (BDR 33-299)
AB230 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing historic preservation. (BDR 22-298)
AB331 in 80th2019: Creates the Outdoor Education and Recreation Grant Program. (BDR 35-89)
AB486 in 80th2019: Creates the Division of Outdoor Recreation within the State Department of Conservation and Natural Resources. (BDR 18-840)
AB537 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to certain penalties imposed by the State Department of Conservation and Natural Resources. (BDR 40-1270)

AJR3 in 80th2019: Expresses support for the Nevada Greater Sage-Grouse Conservation Plan and the Nevada Conservation Credit System and urges the United States Bureau of Land Management to require compensatory mitigation to offset anthropogenic disturbances in accordance with the Nevada Conservation Credit System. (BDR R-511)
SB96 in 80th2019: Creates a grant program to award grants of money to certain organizations applying for federal funds to finance certain projects related to public lands. (BDR 26-510)
SB168 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to energy efficiency standards for buildings. (BDR 58-912)
SB254 in 80th2019: Revises provisions relating to carbon reduction. (BDR 40-907)

SB508 in 80th2019: Makes appropriations to the State Department of Conservation and Natural Resources for the replacement of information technology infrastructure and to the Interim Finance Committee for allocation to the Department for wildfire prevention, restoration and long-term planning. (BDR S-1178)
SB536 in 80th2019: Revises provisions governing the Account for Renewable Energy, Energy Efficiency and Energy Conservation Loans. (BDR 58-1196)
SJR4 in 80th2019: Expresses the support of the Nevada Legislature for certain federal legislation relating to the conservation of wildlife in this State. (BDR R-507)
AB5 in 81st2021: Makes various changes to provisions relating to judicial review of orders and decisions of the State Engineer. (BDR 48-311)
